scripts.check: node scripts/check-workspace.mjs && node scripts/check-architecture.mjs && node scripts/check-db-scaffold.mjs && node scripts/check-runtime-skeleton.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint apps/api/src apps/api/test apps/web/src apps/web/e2e apps/web/playwright.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/api run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/web run typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/api run test && corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/web run test
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/api run build && corepack pnpm --filter @affiliate-global/web run build
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm run check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run build
